bot.name: Agora
global.error.insufficient_perms:
**You are missing the permissions to complete this action.**

_If you believe this is a mistake, please contact server staff!_
perms.feature_embed.desc: Allows users to use the /embed command
perms.feature_channels_voice.desc: Allows users to create custom voice channels
perms.feature_channels_text.desc: Allows users to create custom text channels
perms.feature_channels_unlimited.desc: Allows users to bypass the channel creation limit for the channel creator feature
perms.feature_channels_buttons.desc: Allows users to paste buttons for creating voice/text channels into a channel
perms.feature_channels_preset.desc: Allows users to set presets of who can or cannot view their created channels
perms.feature_rules_mod.desc: Allows users to modify the guild-rules
perms.feature_tickets_view.desc: Allows users to see tickets and send messages in them
perms.feature_activities.desc: Allows users to use the activities feature
perms.feature_activities_manage.desc: Allows users to manage the activities feature
perms.feature_be_real.desc: Allows users to join the BeReal mini-game
perms.feature_be_real_manage.desc: Allows users to manage the BeReal feature
perms.feature_self_roles.desc: Allows users to use the self roles feature
perms.feature_self_roles_manage.desc: Allows users to create self-roles modals
perms.feature_picture_use.desc: Allows users to fetch random pictures using the /picture command.
perms.feature_picture_unsplash.desc: Allows users to fetch random pictures from unsplash.
perms.unsplash_unlimited.desc: Allows users bypass the hourly limit.
perms.feature_joke.desc: Allows users to use the joke feature.
perms.feature_inactivity_no_kick: Members with this permission won't be kicked automatically for inactivity.
feature.settings.command.desc: Modify the settings of the different features of this bot
feature.settings.command.error.no_voice: The channel passed must be a voice channel!
feature.settings.command.reset.desc: Reset the settings of a given module

feature.settings.command.reset.be-real.d: If set to true, the settings of the BeReal module will be reset!

feature.settings.command.channel.text_ca: The category to put newly created text channels into

feature.settings.command.tickets.open_ca: The category newly created tickets will be put in
feature.settings.command.tickets.saved_c: The category tickets will be put in when saved
feature.settings.command.welcome.desc: Modify the settings of the 'Welcome' module.
feature.settings.command.welcome.channel: The channel where welcome messages should be sent in

Set the footer of the welcome message (Variables: $0)
feature.settings.command.welcome.thumbna: Set the thumbnail of the welcome message (Variables: $0)
feature.settings.command.welcome.image.d: Set the image in the welcome message (Variables: $0)
feature.settings.command.welcome.color.d: Set the color of the welcome message (Variables: $0)
feature.settings.command.be-real.desc: Modify the settings of the 'BeReal' feature
feature.settings.command.be-real.enabled: If set to true, BeReal is enabled, if not, BeReal game is paused
feature.settings.command.be-real.channel: The channel where users will be prompted to post their pictures in to
feature.settings.command.be-real.start.d: The time a day should start. Format: mo:HH:mm;tu:HH:mm;...
feature.settings.command.be-real.end.des: The time a day should end. Format: mo:HH:mm;tu:HH:mm;...
feature.settings.command.be-real.num.des: The amount of posts that should be requested per day
feature.settings.command.be-real.time.de: The amount minutes users have time to post a BeReal
feature.settings.command.be-real.view_wi: If set to false, members that aren't participating in the game cannot view posts.
feature.settings.command.be-real.leave-a: The amount of BeReals a participant can miss before being force-quit. (Use -1 to disable)
feature.settings.command.be-real.use_of_: If enabled, the BeReal with the most likes will be announced as the 'BeReal of the day'
feature.settings.command.be-real.of_the_: Set the time to post the BeReal of the day.
Set the channel the BeReal of the day will get posted into. (Default: BeReal channel)
feature.settings.command.be-real.view_ro: Set a role that will be allowed to view the BeReal channel.
feature.settings.command.be-real.of_the_: The weight to give to the dislikes. Ranking is calculated via $likes - $n * $dislikes.
feature.settings.command.picture.desc: Modify the settings of the 'Picture' module.
feature.settings.command.picture.unsplas: Your API Key for unsplash.com. (Only this server will be using this API key)
The maximum amount of pictures a user can fetch from unsplash each hour.

feature.be-real.command.desc: Participants have to post a picture of what they are currently doing at random times a day.

Post a picture of what you are doing within the next **$0** minutes into this channel to keep your streak going.
